name: Holidu API
description: Vacation-rental metasearch with affiliate/partner inventory feed API.

seo.title: Holidu API — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Holidu API: Vacation-rental metasearch with affiliate/partner inventory feed API.

when_to_use: Vacation rental inventory feed for travel affiliate site
Partner API integration for short-term rental search
Property availability data for holiday booking platform
Revenue share via affiliate API for travel content sites
Inventory aggregation for European vacation rental OTA

pros: Access to vacation rental inventory feed
review.verdict: Useful if you need European vacation-rental inventory, but partner-only API limits experimentation.
review.best_for: Travel affiliates targeting European vacation rental bookings
review.not_for: Developers needing global hotel or OTA coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
